msdyn_plan.msdyn_description: A Power Platform solution for OPS, project, and practice leaders to manage month-wise revenue forecasts, submissions, and approvals with variance tracking.
msdyn_plan.msdyn_prompt: Objective Import a CSV containing project master data monthly forecast actuals submission values, and enable month-wise editing, approvals, and variance tracking. Core design rule Do NOT store months as columns. Store one row per Project per Month. Dataverse Tables 1. Project (master) Project ID (key) Project Description Project Billability (Choice) Project End Date Jan PPM (number) Lookups: Customer Org Structure Opportunity Sales Order EDL (Person) PDL (Person) PM (Person) 2. Revenue Record (main fact table) Project (lookup) Financial Year (text) Month Number (1–12) Month Name Forecast Amount Actual Amount Last Submission Amount Current Submission Amount Variance Amount (calculated) Is Locked (Yes/No) Is Auto Estimated (Yes/No) Reason (text) Key: Project Financial Year Month 3. Submission Project (lookup) Financial Year Type (Last / Current) Total Value Status (Draft / Submitted / Approved) Submitted By Submission Date 4. Import Batch File Name Import Date Status Total Rows 5. Supporting tables Customer Org Structure (Tower, Market, BU, Vertical, Sub Practice, Category) Resource Person (EDL/PDL/PM) Opportunity Sales Order CSV Handling From CSV: Create/update Project For each month (Jan–Dec): → create/update Revenue Record Mapping: Jan’26 Forecast → Forecast Amount (Month 1) Jan’26 Actuals → Actual Amount (Month 1) Same for all months FY Last Submission → Submission (Type = Last) FY Current Submission → Submission (Type = Current) Reasons → Revenue Record or separate Reason table Business Logic Variance: Current Submission – Last Submission Edit rules: Only current month next month editable Others locked Auto forecast: If blank → use previous actuals (consider project end date) Import overwrite: If record exists → update Else → create App Features Screens: Import CSV Project List Monthly Forecast Grid Submission Review Approval Dashboard Variance Analysis Roles OPS → import & manage EDL / PDL / PM → update forecast Practice Lead → validate Practice Head → approve Admin → unlock periods Automation CSV upload → parse → validate → load Dataverse Notify EDL/PDL/PM Reminder emails Approval workflow (PL → Practice Head) Output Required Generate: Dataverse schema Relationships Canvas app screens Sample forms Business rules Power Fx formulas for: edit locking variance calculation Import flow design Use prefix: mbg_
